zh.lifeSummary: 當Mary Bentley於1571年2月25日出生在英國英格蘭艾可貝盧哈普 沃爾特時，她的父親John Bentley26歲，母親Mary Gawton22歲。她於1595年與Richard Sothy在英國艾可德布登結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。她去世於1620年在英國英格蘭艾可莎佛朗 瓦爾登享年49歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭艾可貝盧哈普 沃爾特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mary Bentley于1571年2月25日出生在英国英格兰艾可貝盧哈普 沃爾特时，她的父亲John Bentley26岁，母亲Mary Gawton22岁。她于1595年与Richard Sothy在英国艾可德布登结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。她去世于1620年在英国英格兰艾可莎佛朗 瓦爾登享年49岁，埋葬在英国英格兰艾可貝盧哈普 沃爾特。

nameMeanings.name: Bentley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places, the chief of which are in Derbyshire, Essex, Hampshire, Shropshire, Staffordshire, Suffolk, Warwickshire, Worcestershire, and East and South Yorkshire. The placename is from Old English beonet ‘bent grass’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’.
In some cases also an Americanized form of South German Bentele or of its Swiss German or South German cognates Bandle and Bandli.

variants.name: Bently
meanings: Variant of   Bentley   2, a surname of South German or Swiss German origin.

variants.name: Bentele
meanings: South German: from a short form of the personal name Pantaleon (see Pantaleo ).

nameMeanings.name: Mary
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Moira
meanings: Anglicized form of Irish Máire , now used throughout the English-speaking world.

en.lifeSummary: When Mary Bentley was born on 25 February 1571, in Belchamp Walter, Essex, England, United Kingdom, her father, John Bentley, was 26 and her mother, Mary Gawton, was 22. She married Richard Sothy in 1595, in Debden, Essex, England. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. She died in 1620, in Saffron Walden, Essex, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 49, and was buried in Belchamp Walter, Essex, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mary Bentley est née le 25 février 1571, à Belchamp Walter, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Bentley, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Mary Gawton, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé Richard Sothy en 1595, à Debden, Essex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1620, à Saffron Walden, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 49 ans, et a été enterrée à Belchamp Walter, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mary Bentley am 25. Februar 1571 in Belchamp Walter, Essex, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Bentley 26 und ihre Mutter Mary Gawton 22. Sie hat 1595 in Debden, Essex, England Richard Sothy geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1620 im Alter von 49 Jahren in Saffron Walden, Essex, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Belchamp Walter, Essex, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mary Bentley è nata il il 25 febbraio 1571 nel Belchamp Walter, Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, John Bentley, aveva 26 anni e sua madre, Mary Gawton, aveva 22 anni. Lei sposato Richard Sothy nel 1595, nel Debden, Essex, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. ja.lifeSummary: Mary Bentleyが1571年2月25日にイギリスイギリスエセックスベルチャンップ ワルターで生まれた時，父John Bentleyは26歳，母Mary Gawtonは22歳であった。1595年にイギリスエセックスデブデンでRichard Sothyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1620年にイギリスイギリスエセックスサフロン ワルデンで49歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスエセックスベルチャンップ ワルターにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Mary Bentley(이)가 1571년 2월 25일 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 벨챔프 월터에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Bentley(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mary Gawton(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 1595년 영국 에세스 데브든에서 Richard Sothy(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1620년 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 사프런 월든에서 49세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 벨챔프 월터에 묻혔다.

Ela casou-se com Richard Sothy em 1595, em Debden, Essex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mary Bentley родилась 25 февраля 1571 г. в местности белчамп валтир, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени John Bentley было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Mary Gawton, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard Sothy в 1595 г. в местности дебден, эссекс, Англия. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1620 г. в местности саффрон валден, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 49 лет и была похоронена в местности белчамп валтир, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания.
